levels.explanation: No verification needed for this output at this stage.

checklist: Review the output for obvious errors or gaps

levels.explanation: Read carefully and check key claims before using.
checklist: Run the prompts below as part of your checks
Spot-check key claims against available sources

levels.explanation: Work through the steps below before acting on this output.
checklist: Use the prompts below to support your inspection, then verify independently
Check key claims against primary sources
Have a domain expert review before external use

levels.explanation: Do not share or act on this without formal human sign-off and a documented review.
checklist: Use the prompts below to support your review — they do not replace expert sign-off
Obtain sign-off from a qualified domain expert
Verify all claims against primary sources
Document the review process and who approved it
